title: Market research data
summary: 9609 AS — qualitative vs quantitative data and interpretation.
learningObjectives: Interpret tables, charts, and survey results.
Assess reliability and validity of data.

simpleExplanation.title: Turning answers into decisions
simpleExplanation.summary: Quantitative data gives numbers and trends; qualitative data explains motives and attitudes. Both inform strategy.

sections.content: **Market research data** (3.2.4) completes **Topic 3.2**. Link **data type** to **decision** (product, price, etc.).

sections.label: Mark a market research data question
